title: John Swinney seeks meeting with UK Government over US military using Prestwick

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: John Swinney seeks meeting with UK Government over US military using Prestwick. JOHN Swinney is seeking a meeting with the UK Government over the US military's use of Prestwick Airport.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – John Swinney seeks meeting with UK Government over US military using Prestwick
